phase.claim: governed / pre-implementation; knowledge complete; no expedition started

confidence_map.authority: TASKPRO-STATE-002 + E4 canonical booking state machine

reconciliations.claim: Booking state-machine vocabulary conflict: TASKPRO-FLOW-001 models Draft -> Configured -> Awaiting Payment -> Booked -> Assigned -> En Route -> Arrived -> Working -> Completed -> Rated -> Archived; TASKPRO-DOM-001 models Draft -> Requested -> Searching Professional -> Assigned -> Accepted -> En Route -> Arrived -> In Progress -> ... -> Paid -> Reviewed. One canonical machine must be ratified before workflow synthesis.
reconciliations.resolution_rule: E4 canonical booking state machine (Draft -> Requested -> Accepted -> ProfessionalAssigned -> EnRoute -> Arrived -> InProgress -> Completed -> PaymentPending -> Paid -> Closed, plus terminal branches) adopted as canonical. TASKPRO-FLOW-001 vocabulary is superseded for implementation; screens and workflows must use the E4 vocabulary.
reconciliations.resolution_choice: Option 1 — adopt the E4 domain machine already implemented in packages/domain/src/state-machines/BookingStateMachine.ts.

reconciliations.claim: knowledge/Docs/DS-05.md line 1 begins with a stray character ('i# TASKPRO-DS-005'), corrupting the artifact header.
reconciliations.resolution_rule: Fix requires approval-gated edit of an authored knowledge artifact; not an initialization action.

reconciliations.claim: TASKPRO-DEV-001 retains its React Navigation recommendation, superseded by TASKPRO-TECH-001 (Expo Router canonical).
reconciliations.resolution_rule: Supersession edge recorded in Evidence primitive; DEV-001 document intentionally left unmodified.

reconciliations.claim: DS files are named DS-01.md..DS-05.md while carrying canonical IDs TASKPRO-DS-001..005.
reconciliations.resolution_rule: Resolved by header-anchored registration. Optional file rename is approval-gated and not part of initialization.

reconciliations.claim: knowledge/Docs/API-002.md.txt carries the internal header 'TASKPRO-API-001', which collides with the family ID of API-001.md.txt. During initialization the registry applied filename-derived disambiguation (registered as TASKPRO-API-002) and ID normalization (registered API-001.md.txt as TASKPRO-API-001 despite its header lacking the prefix).
reconciliations.resolution_rule: Documented in Evidence primitive as registry normalization/disambiguation rules; authored artifact left unmodified. Future extraction must follow the same deterministic rules.

invariants: knowledge/ is authored and immutable to SYNTH; changes require explicit approval.
Every governance assertion carries primitive, claim, evidence_sources, derivation_type, confidence.
An assertion with derivation_type UNRESOLVED carries no claim content beyond the open question itself.
Implementation capabilities exist only inside expeditions, never in initialization or governance.
Shell commands in this workspace are RTK-optimized per user skill configuration.
